raw.subject: Your Dayton page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

I loved watching Arizona's confidence grow over your training sessions on Facebook - it's clear she's learned a thing or two! But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might be making it harder for new customers to find and contact you.

I sketched a simple homepage idea that incorporates your Facebook photos and posts, including a services overview and a photo gallery to showcase your work with dogs and their owners.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/dogs-by-nature-training-dayton

It's a straightforward project to build out - a flat fee for local businesses like yours can get you up and running quickly. If you're interested in learning more, feel free to reply or give me a quick call.
